title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions:
Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions!
